title: cyclosorus meeboldii
intro: Cyclosorus meeboldii, also known as the Indian fan fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is an evergreen, terrestrial fern native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and rhizomes. Traditionally, Cyclosorus meeboldii has been used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or infusion for use in herbal remedies, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
